$schema.description: Relative path to this schema, usually ../../manifest.schema.json

organ.description: Stable organ id. Must match the organ directory name.

phase.description: Current skeleton-first phase. graphify reports this field.

status.description: Free-form lifecycle note. Use phase for graph/reporting.

purpose.description: One sentence explaining the user-visible job this organ owns.

ports.description: Port/interface names the organ exposes or consumes.

adapters.description: Map each port name to concrete adapter ids. graphify uses this for Mermaid edges.

exposes.description: Published contract signatures other organs may use.

depends_on.description: Other organ ids this organ depends on. graphify detects circular and dangling dependencies.

owns_data.description: Canonical data domains/files this organ owns. graphify detects overlaps case-insensitively.

external_writes.description: External write operations this organ can perform, such as clickup.create_task.

safety_gate.description: Must be true when external_writes is non-empty, or graphify --strict reports a shadow.
